questions.question: What kind of immorality was being tolerated in the Corinthian church?
options: A man living with his father's wife
questions.answer: A man living with his father's wife

questions.question: What does Paul tell them to do with the immoral person?
Paul says Christians should not associate with anyone in the world who is immoral.
A little _____ leavens the whole lump.
For indeed Christ, our _____, has been sacrificed.
